options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: game_version
options.description:
Set the game version you will be playing on

- **sotfs:** You will be playing the Scholar of the First Sin version
- **vanilla:** You will be playing the Vanilla version

options.name: sunken_king_dlc
options.display_name: Enable Crown of the Sunken King DLC
options.description: Enable Crown of the Sunken King DLC.

options.name: old_iron_king_dlc
options.display_name: Enable Crown of the Old Iron King DLC
options.description: Enable Crown of the Old Iron King DLC.

options.name: ivory_king_dlc
options.display_name: Enable Crown of the Ivory King DLC
options.description: Enable Crown of the Ivory King DLC.

options.name: no_weapon_req
options.description: Remove the requirements to wield weapons

options.name: no_spell_req
options.description: Remove the requirements to cast spells

options.name: no_armor_req
options.description: Remove the requirements to wear armor

options.name: no_equip_load
options.description: Disable the equip load constraint from the game.

options.name: randomize_equipment_level_percentage
options.description: The percentage of weapons and armor in the pool to be reinforced.

options.name: min_equipment_reinforcement_in_5
options.description: The minimum reinforcement level for equipment that can only reach +5.

options.name: max_equipment_reinforcement_in_5
options.description: The maximum reinforcement level for equipment that can only reach +5.

options.name: min_equipment_reinforcement_in_10
options.description: The minimum reinforcement level for equipment that can only reach +10.

options.name: max_equipment_reinforcement_in_10
options.description: The maximum reinforcement level for equipment that can only reach +10.

options.name: combat_logic
options.description:
Determines the distribution of Estus Flask Shards and Sublime Bone Dust.
Easy - Most shards/dust available fairly early on
Medium - Moderate amount of shards/dust available early in the game
Hard - There is minimal logical requirement for shards/dust to be available before the end of the game
Disabled - There is zero requirements for shards/dust anywhere; Lost Bastille is Sphere 1 in Scholar, and Sinners' Rise is Sphere 1 in vanilla.

options.name: infinite_lifegems
options.description: Keep Melentia's infinite supply of lifegems unrandomized

options.name: early_blacksmith
options.description: Force Lenigrast's key into an early sphere in your world or across all worlds.

options.description:
Items that will be marked as useful.
Useful items cannot be placed in excluded or unreachable locations.
Both individual item names and item categories can be used here.

options.name: include_items
options.description:
Items that will be included in the item pool if there is space.
This can be helpful if you want to include an item that is not in logic by default.
Each item will only be added to the item pool once.
